## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off GrowthX engagement to improve Fleet's SEO and AI visibility, particularly for macOS MDM keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/GZzKzeBdNosx8KUSiFvesqiyxtr4Xnop?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Fleet aims to be listed as a viable Jamf alternative in AI/LLM responses for macOS MDM queries](https://fathom.video/share/GZzKzeBdNosx8KUSiFvesqiyxtr4Xnop?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
  - [Target audience: IT admins (esp. Mac teams) at 700+ employee companies with hundreds/thousands of Macs](https://fathom.video/share/GZzKzeBdNosx8KUSiFvesqiyxtr4Xnop?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)
  - [Content strategy: Publish 5 articles/week, potentially in a separate "guides" section, to quickly test and iterate](https://fathom.video/share/GZzKzeBdNosx8KUSiFvesqiyxtr4Xnop?tab=summary&timestamp=3240.0)
  - [Review process: Irena (content calendar), Brock (technical accuracy), Mike T. (tone/voice)](https://fathom.video/share/GZzKzeBdNosx8KUSiFvesqiyxtr4Xnop?tab=summary&timestamp=2966.0)

## Topics

### Current Market Positioning

  - [Fleet positioned as modern, enterprise-ready alternative to legacy MDMs like Jamf](https://fathom.video/share/GZzKzeBdNosx8KUSiFvesqiyxtr4Xnop?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Key differentiators: open-source, multi-platform, flexible deployment (cloud/on-prem), GitOps-friendly](https://fathom.video/share/GZzKzeBdNosx8KUSiFvesqiyxtr4Xnop?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
  - [Target replacing $40M of Jamf's European revenue, leveraging aversion to Microsoft](https://fathom.video/share/GZzKzeBdNosx8KUSiFvesqiyxtr4Xnop?tab=summary&timestamp=2759.0)

### Content Strategy and SEO

  - [Previous minimal SEO investment; now aiming for high-volume content creation](https://fathom.video/share/GZzKzeBdNosx8KUSiFvesqiyxtr4Xnop?tab=summary&timestamp=2863.0)
  - [Will start with 1 calibration article, ramp up to 5/week by weeks 6-8](https://fathom.video/share/GZzKzeBdNosx8KUSiFvesqiyxtr4Xnop?tab=summary&timestamp=3240.0)
  - [Articles may live in a separate, potentially hidden "guides" section to avoid disrupting main blog](https://fathom.video/share/GZzKzeBdNosx8KUSiFvesqiyxtr4Xnop?tab=summary&timestamp=3393.0)
  - [Focus on topics like Jamf migration, on-premise deployment, compliance (PCI, FedRAMP)](https://fathom.video/share/GZzKzeBdNosx8KUSiFvesqiyxtr4Xnop?tab=summary&timestamp=2646.0)

### Customer Objections and Concerns

  - [Perception of Fleet as not mature enough for enterprise MDM](https://fathom.video/share/GZzKzeBdNosx8KUSiFvesqiyxtr4Xnop?tab=summary&timestamp=2467.0)
  - [Budget constraints pushing towards "free" solutions like Microsoft Intune](https://fathom.video/share/GZzKzeBdNosx8KUSiFvesqiyxtr4Xnop?tab=summary&timestamp=2518.0)
  - [Need for on-premise deployment options (e.g., government, finance, retail sectors)](https://fathom.video/share/GZzKzeBdNosx8KUSiFvesqiyxtr4Xnop?tab=summary&timestamp=2601.0)

### Internal Review Process

  - [Irena: Content calendar management, liaison with Mike T.](https://fathom.video/share/GZzKzeBdNosx8KUSiFvesqiyxtr4Xnop?tab=summary&timestamp=2966.0)
  - [Brock: Technical accuracy review](https://fathom.video/share/GZzKzeBdNosx8KUSiFvesqiyxtr4Xnop?tab=summary&timestamp=2966.0)
  - [Mike T: Final approval, tone/voice consistency (1 business day turnaround)](https://fathom.video/share/GZzKzeBdNosx8KUSiFvesqiyxtr4Xnop?tab=summary&timestamp=2966.0)
  - [Sam: CMS access, Google Analytics setup](https://fathom.video/share/GZzKzeBdNosx8KUSiFvesqiyxtr4Xnop?tab=summary&timestamp=2345.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to conduct site audit and propose content structure](https://fathom.video/share/GZzKzeBdNosx8KUSiFvesqiyxtr4Xnop?tab=summary&timestamp=3530.0)
  - [Fleet to share existing materials (battle cards, memos, handbook) with GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/GZzKzeBdNosx8KUSiFvesqiyxtr4Xnop?tab=summary&timestamp=2087.0)
  - [Sam to create video tutorial on adding articles to CMS](https://fathom.video/share/GZzKzeBdNosx8KUSiFvesqiyxtr4Xnop?tab=summary&timestamp=2393.0)
  - [Sam to grant GrowthX view access to Google Analytics](https://fathom.video/share/GZzKzeBdNosx8KUSiFvesqiyxtr4Xnop?tab=summary&timestamp=2345.0)
  - [Schedule additional deep-dive sessions as needed](https://fathom.video/share/GZzKzeBdNosx8KUSiFvesqiyxtr4Xnop?tab=summary&timestamp=3585.0)
  - [Begin development of calibration article](https://fathom.video/share/GZzKzeBdNosx8KUSiFvesqiyxtr4Xnop?tab=summary&timestamp=3100.0)
